blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  UI[Client UI/local state] --> API[REST/Socket.IO]
  API --> LS[Local Server authority]
  LS --> DB[(SQLite)]
  LS --> FS[(Files/backups)]
  LS --> AU[Audit/system events]
  LS -. signed optional .-> PC[Pulse Cloud ledger]

caption.ru: ARCH-02 · Allowed and prohibited data flows.
caption.en: ARCH-02 · Allowed and prohibited data flows.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  C[Client] -->|input| S[Local Server]
  S -->|authoritative state| DB[(Local DB)]
  S -->|signed purchase| P[Pulse Cloud]
  P -->|entitlement result| S
  X[Forbidden] -. no message plaintext .-> P
  Y[Forbidden] -. no client-only auth .-> DB

stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Schema7
  Schema7 --> BackupVerified
  BackupVerified --> Migrating
  Migrating --> Schema8: integrity passes
  Migrating --> RestoreOnly: failure
  RestoreOnly --> Schema7: verified restore
  Schema8 --> [*]

caption.ru: RT-01 · Subscription and stale socket removal.
caption.en: RT-01 · Subscription and stale socket removal.

blocks.value:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Server
  C->>S: authenticated connect
  S-->>C: scoped subscriptions
  S->>S: membership/ban/device revoke
  S-->>C: terminal access event
  S->>S: remove subscriptions
  C--xS: private events rejected

caption.ru: OFF-01 · Outbox, reconnect, delta sync and conflicts.
caption.en: OFF-01 · Outbox, reconnect, delta sync and conflicts.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  D[Draft/outbox] --> Q[Queued mutation]
  Q --> R[Reconnect/auth]
  R --> S[Delta sync/replay]
  S --> I{Already applied?}
  I -->|yes| A[Idempotent ack]
  I -->|no| V[Server validation]
  V -->|conflict| C[Surface conflict]
  V -->|accepted| E[Authoritative event]

alt.en: PWA offline/outbox/reconnect state without user content.
